chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1333 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.6268/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 Ms. Saadia Sumaira, advocate for the petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent. Mr. Rana Sakhawat, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khaleel Dogar, advocate for respondent. Under instructions learned counsel does not press this petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
